ava-√ghrā (Imper. 2. pl. -jighrata; Pot. -jighret [ TS. ;  Mn. iii, 218 ] or -ghrāyāt [ ĀśvŚr. ] ind.p. -ghrāya) to smell at,  VS.  &c.;
to touch with the mouth, kiss,  PārGṛ.  &c.:
Caus. -ghrāpayati, to cause to smell at,  TS. ;  ŚBr. ;  TBr.

avaghrā 1 P.
1 To smell at; touch with the mouth;  Ms. 3. 218. 
2 To kiss (as the head); mūrdhani triravaghrāya  Āśval. ; avaghrātaśca mūrdhani  Rām. 
— Caus.
— (ghrāpayati) To cause to smell at.
